title: DateRange
description: A contiguous set of days: `startDate`, `startDate + 1`, ..., `endDate`. Requests are allowed up to 4 date ranges.

endDate.description: The inclusive end date for the query in the format `YYYY-MM-DD`. Cannot be before `start_date`. The format `NdaysAgo`, `yesterday`, or `today` is also accepted, and in that case, the date is inferred based on the property's reporting time zone.

name.description: Assigns a name to this date range. The dimension `dateRange` is valued to this name in a report response. If set, cannot begin with `date_range_` or `RESERVED_`. If not set, date ranges are named by their zero based index in the request: `date_range_0`, `date_range_1`, etc.

startDate.description: The inclusive start date for the query in the format `YYYY-MM-DD`. Cannot be after `end_date`. The format `NdaysAgo`, `yesterday`, or `today` is also accepted, and in that case, the date is inferred based on the property's reporting time zone.
